doc_title_en: Notice of Acquisition Status and Completion of Acquisition of Treasury Stock (Based on Articles of Association under Company Law Article 165, Paragraph 2)
summary_en: 114,200 shares acquired for ¥73.6M (1.94% of issued shares ex-treasury) through open-market purchase on Tokyo Stock Exchange, completing the ¥110M authorization limit program (87% consumed). Acquisition period: 2025-11-19 to 2026-05-14. Final block of 6,300 shares for ¥3.9M executed 2026-05-01 to 2026-05-14.
summary_jp: 東証市場買付で114,200株を¥73.6Mで取得（発行済み株式の1.94%）。¥110M上限のプログラム完了（消費率87%）。取得期間2025年11月19日～2026年5月14日。最終ブロック6,300株を¥3.9Mで2026年5月1日～14日に執行。
tag_en: Buyback - 114,200 shares (1.94% S/O) - ¥73.6M - Completed - Open market
tag_jp: 自己株式取得 - 114,200株（発行済み株式の1.94%）- ¥73.6M - 完了 - 市場買付
